description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on every pull request and push to the master branch. The workflow has two jobs: test and lint. The test job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix strategy across multiple Python versions, checks out the code, sets up Python, caches venv, installs dependencies with pip and poetry, runs pytest, and uploads coverage to Codecov for specific Python versions. The lint job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, sets up Python 3.8, caches pip, installs black, and runs make lint-check.
